title: xylocarpus guineensis
intro: Xylocarpus guineensis, also known as West African mangrove or Guinea West African mangrove, is a species of mangrove tree native to tropical West Africa. The medicinal properties of Xylocarpus guineensis include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system, among others. Xylocarpus guineensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
